summary: Plan-only live PR inventory classification. No shared canonical was selected because the job is an inventory shard, not a dedupe cluster. No close, merge, fix, or security-routing actions are recommended from the hydrated artifact.

actions.reason: Open maintainer-owned work with waiting-on-author signal and broad UI/i18n surface requires maintainer/author follow-up rather than inventory closeout.
Focused non-security PR with its own validation and a failing relevant check; keep as independent backlog work, not a dedupe/closure candidate.
Small browser PR may be valid but lacks accepted behavior proof in the hydrated state; keep independent rather than close or escalate the whole shard.
Ready, proof-supplied P1 PR needs maintainer technical review outside this plan-only inventory worker; no closure or merge action is allowed.
Draft uneditable contributor PR with failed proof is independent backlog work; no closeout is permitted by this shard and no fix/merge path is allowed.

needs_human: #84827 needs maintainer/author follow-up because the hydrated state is open, maintainer-owned, waiting on author, and broad enough that inventory automation should not close or relabel it.
#84894 needs maintainer technical review because the hydrated state marks it proof-sufficient and ready for maintainer look, but merge/fix actions are blocked in this job.
